---
title: "installization"
format: html
engine: julia
execute:
  daemon: false
julia:
  exeflags: ["--project=@."]
---

# Measurement_settings

## LocalUnitaryMeasurementSetting

### case

```{julia}
using RandomMeas
N = 2 # Number of qubits
NU = 3 # Number of measurement settings
measurement_settings = [LocalUnitaryMeasurementSetting(N) for _ in 1: NU];
println(measurement_settings[3])
```

### doc

#### fields

```{julia}
supertype(LocalUnitaryMeasurementSetting)    
supertype(LocalMeasurementSetting)
```

```{julia}
@doc LocalUnitaryMeasurementSetting # the fields and constrains are at the top, the specified methods at follows.
```

```{julia}
fieldnames(LocalUnitaryMeasurementSetting)
```

Fields:

• N::Int: Number of sites (qubits).
• basis_transformation::Vector{ITensor}: A vector of N ITensors representing the local unitary basis rotations.
• site_indices::Vector{Index{Int64}}: A vector of site indices of length N.

#### methods

```{julia}
@which LocalUnitaryMeasurementSetting(N)
```

All in all, using `(:N, :basis_transformation, :site_indices)` method to create a instance of LocalUnitaryMeasurementSetting.
